value.found_quote: For the Codex app, CLI, or IDE Extension, the default `workspace-write` sandbox mode keeps network access turned off unless you enable it in your configuration... For Codex cloud, see [agent internet access](https://developers.openai.com/codex/cloud/internet-access) to enable full internet access or a domain allow list... You can also control the [web search tool](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/tools-web-search) without granting full network access to spawned commands.
value.rationale: The page clearly substantiates all parts of the claim: (1) Network access is off by default in workspace-write mode ("the default `workspace-write` sandbox mode keeps network access turned off"); (2) full internet access or a domain allowlist can be enabled (referenced for Codex cloud, and configurable via `network_access = true` plus domain rules for CLI/app); (3) web search controls are explicitly described, including cached mode, live mode, and disabled mode. The page describes these as current, active features with detailed configuration options.
